title: Reserialize rejects an unsupported file extension

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered error path: confirm the pre-flight validation rejects a supported-path extension (e.g. `.cs`) before any mutation. The unsupported-extension branch is asserted by the automated test below; no fs setup is needed.

steps.title: Call reserialize with an unsupported extension
Expected outcomes
items: mutation.success is false / absent (no mutation happened)
error message mentions "unsupported extension" and lists .prefab/.unity/.asset/.mat/.controller/.anim

steps.title: Paste the agent output (raw error envelope)

reset.note: Prompt-only error path (no mutation, no fixture); nothing to revert on disk.
